ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrencies" (
  "coin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "coin_name" TEXT /* Full name of the cryptocurrency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol used for the cryptocurrency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cryptocurrency was added to the platform */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cryptocurrency's details were last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the cryptocurrency */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Official website URL of the cryptocurrency */,
  "whitepaper_url" TEXT /* URL to the whitepaper of the cryptocurrency */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the logo of the cryptocurrency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "coin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency */,
  "price" REAL /* Current price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  "volume_24h" REAL /* Volume traded in the last 24 hours */,
  "volume_7d" REAL /* Volume traded in the last 7 days */,
  "volume_30d" REAL /* Volume traded in the last 30 days */,
  "supply" REAL /* Current supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in price */,
  "high_24h" REAL /* Highest price in the last 24 hours */,
  "low_24h" REAL /* Lowest price in the last 24 hours */,
  "data_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the market data entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the market data entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_coin_id FOREIGN KEY ("coin_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("coin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data entry */,
  "coin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the cryptocurrency at a specific point in time */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization at a specific point in time */,
  "volume_24h" REAL /* Volume traded in the last 24 hours at a specific point in time */,
  "volume_7d" REAL /* Volume traded in the last 7 days at a specific point in time */,
  "volume_30d" REAL /* Volume traded in the last 30 days at a specific point in time */,
  "supply" REAL /* Supply of the cryptocurrency at a specific point in time */,
  "change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in price at a specific point in time */,
  "high_24h" REAL /* Highest price in the last 24 hours at a specific point in time */,
  "low_24h" REAL /* Lowest price in the last 24 hours at a specific point in time */,
  "data_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the historical data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the historical data entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the historical data entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_coin_id FOREIGN KEY ("coin_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("coin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "subscription_level" TEXT /* Subscription level of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number for SMS notifications */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* JSON object to store user preferences (e.g., preferred cryptocurrencies, notification settings) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "coin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency to monitor */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition for the alert (e.g., price above $X) */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "alert_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was set */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered) */,
  "triggered_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was triggered */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_coin_id FOREIGN KEY ("coin_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("coin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news item */,
  "coin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency the news is about */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news item */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news item */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date when the news was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news (e.g., website, press release) */,
  "author" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the news item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the news item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_coin_id FOREIGN KEY ("coin_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("coin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experts" (
  "expert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expert */,
  "expert_name" TEXT /* Name of the expert */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty or focus area of the expert */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the expert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the expert's profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the expert's profile was last updated */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* JSON object to store contact information (e.g., email, phone) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expert_opinions" (
  "opinion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opinion */,
  "expert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expert providing the opinion */,
  "coin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency discussed in the opinion */,
  "opinion" TEXT /* Opinion or analysis provided by the expert */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the opinion */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the expert (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date when the opinion was published */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the opinion was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the opinion was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opinion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expert_opinions_expert_id FOREIGN KEY ("expert_id") REFERENCES experts ("expert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expert_opinions_coin_id FOREIGN KEY ("coin_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("coin_id")
)
